scripts.desktop:reset-admin: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const appdata=process.env.APPDATA||'';const candidates=[];if(process.env.NUXT_DESKTOP_DATA_DIR)candidates.push(path.join(process.env.NUXT_DESKTOP_DATA_DIR,'local-config.json'));if(appdata){candidates.push(path.join(appdata,'nuxt-blog-cos-admin','.data','local-config.json'));candidates.push(path.join(appdata,'Nuxt Blog COS Admin','.data','local-config.json'));}candidates.push(path.join(process.cwd(),'.data','local-config.json'));candidates.push(path.join(process.cwd(),'.data-desktop-test','local-config.json'));function resetFile(p){try{if(!fs.existsSync(p))return;let raw='';try{raw=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');}catch{}let cfg=null;try{cfg=JSON.parse(raw);}catch{cfg=null;}if(!cfg||typeof cfg!=='object'){fs.rmSync(p,{force:true});console.log('deleted',p);return;}cfg.version=1;cfg.admin=cfg.admin&&typeof cfg.admin==='object'?cfg.admin:{};delete cfg.admin.passwordHash;delete cfg.admin.sessionSecret;fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(cfg,null,2)+'\n','utf8');console.log('reset',p);}catch(e){console.error('failed',p,e&&e.message?e.message:e);}}for(const p of candidates)resetFile(p);"
